title: Blissify - NY Coffee 3-in-1 Instant White Coffee Mix with Sugar 100 Satchet Case Pack - 10 Cases x 10 Packets - Value Pack
features: CONVENIENT PACK: Value pack containing 10 boxes with 10 sachets each, totalling 100 sachets of premium 3-in-1 instant coffee mix
NEW RECIPE: Enhanced formula combining instant coffee, creamer, and sugar for a perfectly balanced cup every time
QUICK PREPARATION: Simply add hot water to create a rich, creamy coffee beverage - perfect for busy mornings or office breaks
PORTABLE SACHETS: Individual portion-controlled packets ensure consistent taste and are ideal for travel, work, or home use
COMPLETE BLEND: Each sachet contains a pre-measured mixture of coffee, whitener, and sugar for optimal taste without additional ingredients needed
description: Product description Experience the convenience of Blissify NY coffee 3-in-1 instant coffee mix, now available in an economical value case pack containing 10 boxes with 10 sachets each. This new recipe delivers the perfect blend of coffee, creamer, and sugar in every sachet, offering a quick and delicious coffee solution for busy mornings. Each serving creates a rich, creamy cup of coffee with a balanced flavour profile that coffee lovers will appreciate. The individual sachets ensure consistent taste and portion control while maintaining freshness. Perfect for offices, homes, or anywhere you need a reliable coffee fix. This bulk pack provides excellent value for regular coffee drinkers and is ideal for stocking up. Simply add hot water to enjoy a satisfying cup of coffee with the perfect balance of ingredients. The convenient packaging makes it easy to store and share, while the pre-measured sachets eliminate the need for separate cream and sugar. Ingredients Sugar (55%), Glucose Syrup, Instant Coffee (14%), Vegetable Oils (Coconut, Palm in varying proportions). Whey Permeate (from milk), Flavourings, Stabilisers: Sodium Citrates, Potassium Phosphates, Milk Proteins, Salt, Allergy Advice: for allergens, see ingredients in bold. Product may contain Soybeans and Cereals containing gluten
